heading: Branches of Government Publishing Office; limitations
label: 315 Branches of Government Publishing Office; limitations
text: Money appropriated by any Act may not be used for maintaining more than one branch of the Government Publishing Office in any one building occupied by an executive department of the Government, and a branch of the Government Publishing Office may not be established unless specifically authorized by law.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 61 (, ).Aug. 1, 1914, ch. 223, § 138 Stat. 673

Change of Name“Government Publishing Office” substituted for “Government Printing Office” in section catchline and text on authority of , set out as a note preceding .section 1301(b) of Pub. L. 113–235section 301 of this title
